languages.text: "Никто и не просит. Располагайтесь поудобнее, а там, глядишь, через пару месяцев Погонщица сама уползет".

traits.locale_text: "Никто и не просит. Располагайтесь поудобнее, а там, глядишь, через пару месяцев Погонщица сама уползет".
traits.speaker: IzhdrigBatoshskiColonel

languages.text: "No one is asking you to. Make yourself comfortable. With any luck, the Drover will crawl away on its own in a couple of months."
languages.original_text: "Никто и не просит. Располагайтесь поудобнее, а там, глядишь, через пару месяцев Погонщица сама уползет".

traits.locale_text: "No one is asking you to. Make yourself comfortable, with any luck, the Drover will crawl away on her own in a couple of months."
"No one is asking you to. Make yourself comfortable, with any luck, the Drover will crawl away on her own in a couple of months."
"No one is asking you to. Make yourself comfortable. With any luck, the Drover will crawl away on her own in a couple of months."
"No one is asking you to. Make yourself comfortable. With any luck, the Drover will crawl away on her own in a couple of months."
"No one is asking you to. Make yourself comfortable. With any luck, the Drover will crawl away on its own in a couple of months."

languages.text: "Niemand bittet Euch darum. Richtet Euch ein. Mit etwas Glück kriecht der Treiber in einigen Monaten freiwillig davon."
languages.original_text: "No one is asking you to. Make yourself comfortable. With any luck, the Drover will crawl away on its own in a couple of months."

traits.locale_text: "Niemand bittet Euch darum. Richtet Euch ein. Mit etwas Glück kriecht der Treiber in einigen Monaten freiwillig davon."

languages.text: « Personne ne vous le demande. Mettez-vous à l'aise. Avec un peu de chance, le Chasseur se retirera spontanément d'ici deux ou trois mois. »
languages.original_text: "No one is asking you to. Make yourself comfortable. With any luck, the Drover will crawl away on its own in a couple of months."

traits.locale_text: « Personne ne vous le demande. Mettez-vous à l'aise. Avec un peu de chance, le Chasseur se retirera spontanément d'ici deux ou trois mois. »

languages.text: «Nadie le pide que lo haga. Póngase cómod{mf|o|a}. Con un poco de suerte, el Pastor se alejará por su cuenta en unos meses».
languages.original_text: "No one is asking you to. Make yourself comfortable. With any luck, the Drover will crawl away on its own in a couple of months."

traits.locale_text: «Nadie le pide que lo haga. Póngase cómod{mf|o|a}. Con un poco de suerte, el Pastor se alejará por su cuenta en unos meses».

languages.text: "Sizden bunu yapmanızı isteyen yok. Rahatınıza bakın. Şansımız yaver giderse Çoban birkaç aya kendi kendine sürünerek uzaklaşır."
languages.original_text: "No one is asking you to. Make yourself comfortable. With any luck, the Drover will crawl away on its own in a couple of months."

traits.locale_text: "Sizden bunu yapmanızı isteyen yok. Rahatınıza bakın. Şansımız yaver giderse Çoban birkaç aya kendi kendine sürünerek uzaklaşır."

languages.text: “也没人逼您，请自便。运气好的话，再过几个月，拒生花自己就会爬走了。”
languages.original_text: "No one is asking you to. Make yourself comfortable. With any luck, the Drover will crawl away on its own in a couple of months."

traits.locale_text: “也没人逼您，请自便。运气好的话，再过几个月，拒生花自己就会爬走了。”

languages.text: 「誰も君にそんなことを求めていない。落ち着いて。運が良ければ、2、3ヶ月でドローバーは自分で去っていくだろう。」
languages.original_text: "No one is asking you to. Make yourself comfortable. With any luck, the Drover will crawl away on her own in a couple of months."

traits.locale_text: 「誰も君にそんなことを求めていない。落ち着いて。運が良ければ、2、3ヶ月でドローバーは自分で去っていくだろう。」
